horoscope: Discontent is possible today, dear Aries, but ideally, it motivates you to make needed adjustments. It’s not a day for moving ahead straightforwardly, but you can get some little things done that ultimately help you advance. Interactions can be a little strained, and emotional bias can color a lot of what is communicated. It’s hard to be objective now, and there can be difficulties discerning whether or not what you’re hearing is true. There can be some defensiveness as well, but all of these things are likely to pass quickly. Aim to slow down and identify areas of your life that need some tweaking. Today, bonding moments can happen in friendships or partnerships. You may get the opportunity to work on letting go of resentment, or you might gain an understanding of a situation with someone’s help. Still, a Sun-Pluto minor challenge can dial up the demands and your stress levels in spots. The key is avoiding getting caught up in too many projects or worrying about multiple things at once.

Excellent energy is with you for connecting and sharing with others, dear Taurus. Conversations about or with a partner can be very fruitful and significant. It’s also an excellent time to nurture or grow a practical project. As the day progresses, some realignment or rerouting may help you. A Sun-Pluto transit isn't very free-flowing nor conducive to pushing ahead with personal plans. As such, it may be best to take your time with new initiatives. Issues of power, control, and responsibility can crop up, or money worries cloud your thinking, so aim to take your time and stay centered.

Early today, there could be missed messages or instructions, dear Gemini. You may not be getting the full story. There can be a hidden agenda, or problems of the past can interfere with your enjoyment of the moment. Today is excellent for harmonizing with a partner or close friend about core values, however. Emotional blocks can loosen in intimate relationships. But with a minor Sun-Pluto minor challenge later today, you could feel undermined. Avoid negative thinking or expectations as much as possible, as it can set you up for a fall. While you should do your best to avoid getting caught up in emotional games, try not to use manipulative tactics to get what you want.

A person in authority could veto a plan, or there may be other blocks to smoothly getting your message and ideas across today, dear Cancer. However, you may be distinguishing yourself in your work in some significant way. Trying to balance or juggle your social life and attention to duties or work could be a lesson in frustration, but your faith in a project or line of work can take you places now. Today is also powerful for family and intimate relationships, particularly as you’re emotionally courageous. Later today, a Sun-Pluto minor challenge can introduce pressure. There can be tensions in interpersonal relationships if you or others focus on the flaws or complexities, which is a tendency now. The key will be to prioritize and adopt a mature approach, avoiding the sometimes strong pull towards game playing and tit-for-tat arguments.

Because the atmosphere can be a little tense early today, dear Leo, make an extra effort to get over the smaller problems and challenges, as annoying as they can be. Getting back on track can be a priority now. You can get very serious about a belief or principle today, but try not to let narrow-mindedness in others rain on your parade. If it's truly not important, let go for your own peace of mind. Fortunately, as you share ideas or past experiences, you might boost a bond. You might find it easier than usual to discuss issues and problems, focusing on improvement and repair. Later today, distractions and worries or fireworks with friends or lovers can interrupt the flow. There's a tendency to dial up the drama, and it's a good idea to aim to stay grounded and objective amidst the confusion.

Revision may be necessary early today, dear Virgo. Mixed signals abound. Otherwise, this day is strong for working through problems with friends, as you're not in any mood to stay in a rut. Instead, you want to move forward. Teaching can come naturally now. This can be a wonderful time to make long-term plans or to come up with substantial ways to achieve a goal or dream. Helping others can figure strongly now, and can be most rewarding. You can have a keen sense for worthwhile pursuits now. With a minor challenging aspect between the Sun and Pluto later today, don't let power games with someone or worrisome work matters spoil your good humor. Consider that rushing through your tasks will likely lead to mistakes and disagreements. Get in better touch with your true desires before taking action.

Early today, try not to come down heavily on others if they don't seem to be recognizing your needs, dear Libra. There could be an obligation to a friend or partner today that weighs you down. Be as patient as you can, both with others and with yourself. Keep in mind that limitations encountered now are likely to set you on a new path that is more realistic or truer to your values. As well, zeroing in on projects or even people that truly matter to you can be rewarding. Transits later today could stir up money, business, or ownership matters, and your stronger focus on complicated emotions can interfere with your productivity. Avoid jumping to conclusions or resorting to tactics to get your way with the Sun and Pluto in a minor challenging aspect. Aim to get more information before making important decisions.

Early today, if worry pushes your buttons enough to launch you into action, dear Scorpio, then it can be productive. However, if it doesn't, it's a time-waster. Fortunately, you could put the puzzle pieces together regarding a health or work matter, which is helpful. Your ideas come down to earth, and with the right combination of innovation and practicality, you're raring to go. Your sense of what will work and thrive is in great form now. Today is potentially excellent for breakthroughs related to home or family. Later today, someone in your life could be envious or devious as a minor Sun-Pluto challenging transit inclines us to avoid a direct route to our goals. Aim to focus as much as you can on positive mental stimulation. You don't need a master plan to be productive right now, so aim to be patient.

With the Moon in your playful solar fifth house all day, dear Sagittarius, there should be a pleasing amount of drama in your life. Increased clarity can come to your creative world, or you have the chance to distinguish yourself in a creative field, but you also need to put in the work. Thankfully, self-discipline is improving these days, after a minor hiccup today. Try not to allow vague worries and doubts to hold you back, but it might be better to wait for a better time to declare or process complicated feelings. Later today, you might aim to avoid undue stress, particularly over differences of opinion.

Early today, conversations can be difficult if the people involved are in a defensive state, dear Capricorn. There can be a mental disconnect with someone close to you. Save important ideas or topics for a more free-spirited time, if possible. Fortunately, you're in a great position to zero in on the most worthwhile activities that can boost your income or career satisfaction. A dream can inspire you to reach your goals, particularly related to relationships. Discipline is required of you when it comes to family and home life, but it can feel good to fulfill your responsibilities. It can be challenging at times, however, to get rest and relaxation. Later today, a minor Sun-Pluto challenge can stir up fears of not reaching your goals and a sense that you need to strategize to get what you want. Work, duties, or the stresses of daily life can tug at you. Aim to watch and listen before making big moves.

There can be up and down moods at times today, dear Aquarius, primarily because looks can be deceiving right now. Perhaps someone is tiptoeing around the truth. Early today's energies are not conducive to healthy conversations about something dear to your heart. However, the somewhat awkward energies of the day can prompt you to make nice improvements in areas of your life that are weakened or vulnerable. Fortunately, it’s a good time to nurture, develop, or grow a personal plan, but you’re also in good shape for supporting others and for mutually beneficial activities. Filter out as much drama as possible, and try to remain calm and objective.

Good energy is with you for seeing important patterns in your financial and business affairs, dear Pisces. You might also find creative ways to combine your responsibilities with fun or personally rewarding activities. With family and personal matters, you're determined to pour more of your attention into problem areas to work through them. Later today, there may be some tensions and possibly underhanded or deceptive behavior due to a minor Sun-Pluto challenge. Watch for power struggles that lead nowhere, and strive to avoid getting entangled in ego-driven matters for the best results. Focus on what you need to do and feel you should do, and don't take on any more than that.
